decoder.name: cybershield-sec-violation
decoder.regex: SEC_VIOLATION: (\S+ \S+) detected on (\S+ \d+) - Interface (\S+) - (\d+) packets sent - (.+) - MITRE:(\S+)
decoder.order: attack_type, port_info, interface, packet_count, status, mitre_id

decoder.name: cybershield-sec-violation-simple
decoder.regex: SEC_VIOLATION: (\S+ \S+) detected on (\S+ \d+) - Interface (\S+) - (\d+) packets sent
